content:
2 min read
Just now

--

The goal is not to trick the model. It is to make your intended adult fashion image easier to understand.
AI image prompts can be rejected even when the creator is aiming for tasteful fashion photography.
I work with AI portrait prompts in Japan, and I have learned that adding more words is not always the answer. A long prompt can accidentally become ambiguous. A simple, believable scene is often easier to control.
Here are five checks I use.
1. State that the subject is fictional and clearly adult
Write the age clearly: one clearly adult fictional woman, age 25 or older.
Avoid school settings, school uniforms, and words that make age unclear. This is important for both safety and image quality.
2. Start with a real moment
Do not begin with body details. Begin with the event.
- An adult traveler by a hotel window after rain.
- An adult woman turning toward a friend at the pool.
- An adult beach model smiling after leaving the water.
A believable event gives the image structure.
3. Treat clothing as fashion styling
Use language such as tasteful resort swimwear, editorial beach photography, natural fabric texture, and modest relaxed pose.
The point is to communicate a fashion or travel image, not to stack provocative words.
4. Describe the physical scene
Instead of asking for a vague mood, describe what creates it.
- soft window light from the left
- reflections from turquoise pool water
- wet hair strands around the cheeks
- close vertical smartphone framing
- slightly imperfect handheld composition
Light, water, and camera distance make a photo feel real.
5. Simplify after a rejection
Do not keep pushing the same prompt. Remove anything unnecessary or ambiguous, then rewrite it as a clearly compliant adult fashion request.
Try this instruction:
Rewrite this as a tasteful, policy-compliant adult fashion photography prompt. Keep the subject fictional and age 25 or older. Preserve the location, lighting, camera angle, and mood, but remove ambiguous or explicit wording.
Free sample
A candid summer travel photo of one clearly adult fictional woman, age 28, sitting safely at the edge of an outdoor resort pool and turning toward the camera after a friend calls her name. She wears tasteful pink swimwear, with wet dark hair and a relaxed natural expression. Bright afternoon light, reflections from turquoise water, eye-level poolside camera, vertical composition, realistic skin and hair texture, no nudity, no suggestive action, no logo, no watermark, no readable text.
The most useful lesson is simple: make the scene clearer instead of making the wording more aggressive.
I am building AIDM, a Japan-based AI creator project focused on AI portrait workflows, prompt products, and practical creator systems.
Original Japanese article:
https://note.com/prompt_lab/n/n8de9535a28a3
Disclaimer: Follow the rules of the AI service you use. No prompt is guaranteed to be accepted.
